mapper.select: SELECT i.*, u.username, u.avatar AS user_avatar, c.name AS category_name FROM t_item i LEFT JOIN t_user u ON i.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN t_category c ON i.category_id = c.id WHERE i.id = #{id}

SELECT i.*, u.username, u.avatar AS user_avatar, c.name AS category_name FROM t_item i LEFT JOIN t_user u ON i.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN t_category c ON i.category_id = c.id WHERE i.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY i.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_item (user_id, category_id, title, description, images, location, contact_info, item_type, status, ai_category, ai_review_result, ai_review_pass, found_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{images}, #{location}, #{contactInfo}, #{itemType}, #{status}, #{aiCategory}, #{aiReviewResult}, #{aiReviewPass}, #{foundTime})
